file_layout.note: Counts-based ratchet per Phase 7 CONTEXT D-07. Regenerate with --write-baseline when drift is legitimately reduced.

user_docs_jargon.note: Counts-based ratchet for GSD-jargon mentions in user-facing plugin docs (README.md, CHANGELOG.md). Fenced code blocks are stripped before scanning so /gsd: examples and file-path examples inside ``` blocks do not pollute the ratchet. Regenerate with --write-baseline when a legitimate addition lands (e.g., a CHANGELOG entry describing internal work).
